title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Asian Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Asian Paints
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
